description_long: This is a stone obelisk monument set atop a multi-tiered, rectangular concrete base with four visible steps leading up to the central pedestal. The obelisk itself is relatively short and square in cross-section, rising from a solid plinth and capped with a slightly protruding, flat top. The front face of the pedestal features a rectangular plaque or inscription panel, which appears to contain text, though the details are not fully legible. The structure is weathered, with visible discoloration and some dirt or moss accumulation, especially on the steps and lower surfaces. The surrounding area is a patch of bare earth, suggesting it is set in an open, possibly public space. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on geometric, functional design.
description: A short, square stone obelisk on a multi-stepped concrete base with a front-facing inscription panel and weathered surfaces. The monument is surrounded by bare earth and has a simple, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the inscription panel on the pedestal and the full set of steps leading up to the obelisk.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the plain back of the obelisk and the stepped base, with some dirt and weathering visible.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the obelisk's profile, the layered steps, and the solid plinth supporting the monument.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the steps and the plain side of the obelisk, with more earth and weathering on the base.
attribute_inscription: A rectangular inscription panel is present on the front face of the pedestal, featuring text in a block style. The language and full content are not legible from the images, but the panel is clearly visible and centrally located.
attribute_base_design: The base consists of four rectangular, tiered steps made of concrete, forming a broad, stable platform. The steps are plain, with no decorative features, and show signs of weathering and dirt accumulation.
attribute_tip_design: The tip of the obelisk is flat and square, with a slightly protruding capstone. There are no unique features or decorations at the tip.
attribute_surrounding_features: The obelisk is surrounded by a patch of bare earth, with no visible paving, fencing, or additional objects immediately adjacent.
